test_cases.input: Subject: a former child soldier, now in his 30s, participating in a documentary about post-conflict reconstruction. Extensive prior media appearances. Significant known trauma history.
test_cases.notes: Sensitivities section was appropriately serious and specific about trauma-informed filming approaches. On-camera assessment noted the risk of over-familiar narratives from extensive prior coverage. First session approach recommended trauma-aware pacing.

test_cases.input: Subject: an expert climate scientist who appears frequently in media. Documentary on climate inaction. No personal connection to the subject matter — purely professional role.
test_cases.notes: Brief correctly identified the challenge of making an expert voice feel personal rather than lecturing. Key narrative territory focused on the emotional experience of scientific certainty being ignored — a fresh angle on a media-familiar subject.

test_cases.input: Subject: a teenager participating in a documentary about homelessness. First media appearance. Parents have given consent. Minimal background available.
test_cases.notes: Handled the minor subject appropriately — first session approach was strongly protective and age-appropriate. On-camera assessment section was brief and honest about the absence of track record without over-analyzing. Sensitivities section was the strongest in the output.

editorial_naturalness_baseline.protocol: EVAL_FRAMEWORK.md Section A — Editorial Naturalness rubric (1-5 anchored on observable lexical, structural, tonal, and genre tells).
editorial_naturalness_baseline.calibration_methodology: Single-output baseline pass scoring the in-skill canonical example (the dimension reviewer's primary calibration target per the AUT-23 SKILL_TEMPLATE.md update).
editorial_naturalness_baseline.tells_observed: None. The colloquial parenthetical '(these are gold for later interviews)' is appropriate to the 'professional, conversational register' the spec calls for, not a sycophantic break.
editorial_naturalness_baseline.strongest_genre_craft: Doc director's working voice is correctly inhabited — observational and specific ('His working life was built entirely within a single institution before it disappeared beneath him at 42,' 'the first day's job is to make the second day possible'). The 8-step first-session plan distinguishes camera and no-camera moments correctly, which is the practical knowledge a working director carries.
editorial_naturalness_baseline.note_on_pre_existing_fields: The overall_mean, dimension_means, and per-test-case scores below are preserved as a record of the original eval session and were never updated by the AUT-7 actionability relift. The eval_score in the skill frontmatter and EVAL_SUMMARY.md table reflect post-AUT-7 + post-AUT-23 values; this baseline block is the new authoritative source for those numbers.
